title: AnimeBoard
body:
At the time I had been looking for a good scoreboard plugin that was free but I couldn't find one that worked properly. The only other options were paid ones and they were too much for just a fun little server. So I have now created my own scoreboard plugin!

![image](https://i.imgur.com/Mzkv126.png)

## Versions
- Should work with all versions 1.8 - 1.19 but currently only tested specifically with 1.12 and 1.19. It is mainly targeted towards 1.13+


## Features
- PAPI support (Now updates PlaceHolders)
- Scoreboard (Of course)
- Non-flicker animations (should work)
- Built-in PlaceHolders
- 32 character legacy support

## Planned Features
- Animations
- Multiple scoreboards
- Performance optimization
- And a lot more!

Metrics https://bstats.org/plugin/bukkit/AnimeBoard/9758
